phase: FAZ 0b -- Stage 0 pre-registration (value factor IC; N=3/3 LAST measurement)
discipline: Definitions / universe / itemCode map / window / horizons / keep rule + snapshot hashes frozen BEFORE measurement. N=3/3 -- after this there is NO further Faz 0 IC measurement. D-177/D-178 results untouched.
approach: STANDALONE PARALLEL (NOT composite): F/DD and EV/EBITDA measured separately (avoids the D-177 composite-dilution trap; composite, if any, is built in Faz 1).

fd_dd_pb.formula: market_cap / book_value; lower = cheaper = higher value rank (inverted)
fd_dd_pb.book_value: EAOoP itemCode 2O (non-bank) / total equity 2O under UFRS (bank, D-182); book<=0 -> NaN
fd_dd_pb.market_cap: shares * frozen price; shares = IssuedCapital(itemCode 2OA, point-in-time annual) / par
fd_dd_pb.par_guard: shares cross-checked vs yfinance sharesOutstanding (price-independent); |ratio-1|>0.20 -> value NULL (par!=1 or capital change). FROZEN null set below.

ev_ebitda.formula: (market_cap + TotalLiabilities - Cash) / EBITDA; lower = cheaper = higher value rank (inverted)
ev_ebitda.ebitda: operating profit (3DF) + D&A (4CAB Amortisman & Itfa Paylari); EBITDA<=0 -> NaN
ev_ebitda.banks: EV/EBITDA = NULL for banks (D-182: bank EBITDA not comparable); F/DD only

factors.value_deferred_note: value was deferred from D-177/D-178 (no data); now sourced via MaliTablo (RR-032-V3/D-181/D-182).

data_source.itemcode_discovery: Live-discovered on THYAO (XI_29, 147 rows) + AKBNK (UFRS, 192 rows) at Stage 0. Only 2O (EAOoP) was pre-confirmed (RR-035 rho=1.0, 3-source); the other 6 verified by Turkish itemName against the live response. Smoke check: THYAO shares=1.38e9 (par=1 correct), restated values sane.
data_source.cross_sectional_consistency: RR-035 (D-182): MaliTablo EAOoP Spearman rho=1.0 vs Mynet (+stockanalysis.com), all sectors -> uniform basis (NRR-002 rank-IC safe even if TMS29-absolute unknown).

tms29_uniform_basis.rationale: RR-036: SPK 2023/81 -> TMS 29 first mandatory FY2023 year-end; FY2023 restated public ~mid-2024 + SPK +10wk extension. 2024-01 start invalid (mixed nominal+restated basis + look-ahead). 2024-09 = first uniform-restated point.
tms29_uniform_basis.ebitda_basis: latest-public restated ANNUAL operating profit + D&A (uniform single-basis; NOT mixed-base TTM). maintainer.
tms29_uniform_basis.point_in_time: conservative deterministic lag: annual pub_date = period_end + 120 days; valuation date t uses latest annual with pub_date <= t. Look-ahead-safe (errs late, never early). maintainer.

usd_note_D180: F/DD and EV/EBITDA are dimensionless and FX(t) is common across all tickers on date t -> USD conversion does NOT change cross-sectional rank. IC is computed on TL ratios; USD (EVDS TP.DK.USD.A, frozen) is for NRR-002 compliance + level + the TL-rank==USD-rank sanity (rho==1.0 by construction).
horizon_note: value slower than momentum -> +126 (6mo). h=126 over ~20mo likely has non-overlap n<12 -> ICIR-ineligible (min-n guard handles); value decision rests on {21,63} in practice.

keep_rule.rule: KEEP if ANY eligible h in {21,63,126} has |honest_t(NW HAC lag=h)| >= 2.0 AND non-overlap ICIR >= 0.5; eligible = non-overlap n >= 12.
keep_rule.bars: SAME as D-178, result-independent: 2.0 = IC_INVESTABLE_TSTAT_MIN (pre-D-177) + classic t~=2; 0.5 = ARCHITECTURE 7.1; n>=12 tiny-sample ICIR guard.
keep_rule.DEC-039: honest_t MEASURED; value < bar -> drops, NO rescue -> 'RS+low-vol+value weak as standalone cross-sectional factors in this universe/window' is honest info (premise re-think).

universe.source: SAME 97-name ADV-filtered faz0_v2 universe (D-178); price forward-returns reuse the frozen faz0_v2 price snapshot.

par_guard.note: market_cap cross-check would be contaminated by price drift (frozen ref vs current); shares isolate par!=1 / capital changes. Verified: FROTO/AEFES shares ratio=1.000 (false positives removed).

coverage.fundamental_null_reason: insurance companies -> different financialGroup; empty XI_29 (2/97 documented gap)

config_budget: N=3 of <=3 (LAST). After this: no further Faz 0 IC measurement.
decision_owner: maintainer (DEC-039). Harness MEASURES and RECOMMENDS the final Faz 1 factor set (lowvol60 from D-178 + value keepers); does not finalize.
